title: thelypteris articulata
intro: Thelypteris articulata, also known as the golden leather fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris articulata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder or added to salves and ointments for topical application.
